00
Purpose & Context for Claude
This document is a reference guide to be provided to Claude AI at the start of future conversations about the Kantier project.

📋 Instructions for Claude READ FIRST

This HTML document is a living reference guide for the Kantier construction management platform project. It should be provided at the beginning of new conversations so Claude has full context about what has been built, what is planned, and what design decisions have been made.

What this document contains: Screenshots and analysis of Fieldwire and PlanRadar (the two main competitors/inspirations), a complete overview of the Kantier platform, the prioritized development backlog, and feature comparison matrices showing gaps between what Kantier currently has and what it needs.

How to use this document: When a new chat starts, the user (Aurora Baba, founder of Kantier) will paste this document or reference it. Use it to understand the full context before beginning work. New screenshots may be added over time — always update the analysis sections accordingly.

Key principle: Kantier is inspired by Fieldwire and PlanRadar but is not a copy. It must be adapted for the Albanian construction market — simpler, more affordable, 100% in Albanian language, and focused on field teams rather than enterprise clients.

Document Version
v1.0 — March 27, 2026
Initial creation with 11 screenshots
Screenshots Included
Fieldwire: 8 views
PlanRadar: 3 views
Next Update
Add: Fieldwire Photos view
Add: Fieldwire Forms view
Add: More PlanRadar views
01
Kantier — Platform Overview
Everything Claude needs to know about Kantier to continue working on it effectively.
Platform (MVP Live)
kantier.vercel.app
Website
kantier-website.vercel.app
Tech Stack
Next.js 16.2 + Supabase
Vercel hosting
Founder
Aurora Baba
Project Manager & Senior Architect
UCL London
What Kantier Is
Albania's first digital construction site management platform. A SaaS tool that replaces WhatsApp and Excel in Albanian construction project management. Inspired by Fieldwire and PlanRadar but built specifically for the Albanian market — 100% in Albanian language, 10-20x cheaper than international alternatives, mobile-first, and designed for field teams including workers with no technical background.

The Albanian construction sector is growing rapidly (1.9M m² permits in Tirana in 2024, €1B+ annual investment) but project management is completely manual. No local software exists for this market. Kantier is the first mover.

✅ Currently Built (MVP)

Plan Management: Upload PDF plans, interactive zoom/pan, add pins with tasks at specific locations, version control. PDF viewer uses pdfjs-dist v3.4.120.

Task Management: Kanban board with priority columns (Priority 1/2/3, Completed), checklist, photos, assignee, deadlines, categories.

Team Coordination: Role-based access for managers, engineers, contractors, workers.

Photo Documentation: Upload photos linked to project and task.

PDF Reports: Auto-generate daily log, inspection report, progress report.

Dashboard: Project stats overview.

🔧 Known Bugs to Fix

1. PDF Zoom Bug (CRITICAL): Scroll zoom triggers "Cannot use same canvas during multiple render() operations" error. Files: src/app/dashboard/projektet/[id]/planet/page.tsx and pdf-renderer.tsx. Fix: debounce scale changes or use renderTaskRef.cancel().

2. Pin → Task Form: Clicking a pin on a plan should open the full task creation form (same as normal task creation), but currently opens a simplified modal.

Supabase Tables
projektet — projects
planet — plans
detyrat — tasks
  ↳ titulli, prioriteti, kategoria
  ↳ projekti_id, plan_id
  ↳ pin_x, pin_y, pin_faqja
  ↳ krijuar_nga, statusi
  ↳ foto_urls, checklist, komentet
Pricing Model (Planned)
Free: 1 project, 3 members
Starter €29/mo: 5 projects, unlimited members
Pro €79/mo: Unlimited + advanced reports
Enterprise €199/mo: Custom + dedicated support
Competitors
Fieldwire — $54+/user/mo, English only
PlanRadar — €39+/user/mo, no Albanian
Procore — $375+/mo, enterprise
Mjeshter.pro — local, ERP/finance only (complementary, not competing)
02
Development Plan — Prioritized
Ordered list of improvements and features to build, based on competitor analysis and founder requirements.
1
Fix PDF Zoom Bug
Scroll zoom causes canvas re-render race condition: "Cannot use same canvas during multiple render() operations". Solution: debounce scale state changes OR call renderTask.cancel() before starting a new render. The renderTaskRef pattern already exists in pdf-renderer.tsx but scale change causes component remount.
pdf-renderer.tsx planet/page.tsx CRITICAL BUG ~2 hours
Bug
2
Fix Pin → Full Task Form
When clicking on a plan to place a pin, the full task creation form should open (same form as normal task creation from the tasks board), pre-filled with pin coordinates. Currently opens a simplified modal that doesn't have all task fields.
planet/page.tsx HIGH ~3 hours
Bug
3
Dashboard Metrics — PlanRadar Style
Add 6 metric cards at top of dashboard: Total Projects, Tasks Created by Me, Tasks Assigned to Me, Tasks as Receiver, Overdue Tasks, Tasks Due Soon. Each card clickable to filter the task list. Add a donut chart showing task status breakdown per project.
dashboard/page.tsx HIGH ~4 hours
Feature
4
Task List View with Filters
Add a full task list view (table) with columns: ID, Title, Status, Priority, Project, Plan/Layer, Created date, Assignee. Filterable by Status, Category, Assignee, Plan, Overdue. Sortable columns. Matches Fieldwire's "All tasks" table view.
detyrat/page.tsx HIGH ~5 hours
Feature
5
Task Detail Panel — Expanded Fields
Add missing fields to task detail view: Start date, End date, Manpower (hours), Cost, Tags, Watchers, Related tasks, Activity log (history of changes). Matches Fieldwire's task detail panel. Plan thumbnail linking back to plan view.
detyrat/[id]/page.tsx MEDIUM ~6 hours
Feature
6
Plans Grid — Category Organization + Thumbnails
Plans list should show thumbnail previews organized by category (Architectural, Civil, Electrical, Hydraulic, Structural). Grid/list view toggle. Version control button visible per plan. Task count badge on each plan thumbnail.
planet/page.tsx MEDIUM ~4 hours
Feature
7
Files Module
Add a Files section per project for non-plan documents: RFIs, Submittals, Specifications, Design Changes, Reports. Folder structure with file upload, Type/Name/Updated by/Last updated/Links columns. Matches Fieldwire's Files view.
New: files/page.tsx MEDIUM ~8 hours
New Module
8
Project Reports Module
Structured report templates: Daily site diary, Inspection report, Progress report for client. Pre-defined templates with checkboxes and photo attachment. Status tracking (Draft, In Review, Approved). Export to PDF. Matches PlanRadar's Project Reports module.
New: raportet/page.tsx MEDIUM ~10 hours
New Module
FW-01
Fieldwire — Projects View
How Fieldwire organizes projects at the top level.
🏗️
Projects List — Card View
Fieldwire
  • Card-based grid layout, minimal info per card
  • Each card shows: project name, member count, star/favorite
  • Top nav: Projects, People, Account, Templates, Integrations
  • Sort and Filter projects buttons top right
  • Clean white background — very minimal design
👥
People / User Management
Fieldwire
  • Table view: Name, Email, Company, Phone, Projects count, Account Role
  • Actions: New users, Export user list
  • Filter by All users / role
  • Account roles: Account owner, Admin, Member
  • Kantier equivalent: Menaxhim Ekipit — needs Company and Phone fields
FW-02
Fieldwire — Plans & PDF Viewer
The core plan management feature — most critical module for Kantier to match.
🗺️
Plans Grid — Category Organization
Fieldwire
  • Left sidebar shows task categories with counts: Ceilings(1), Clean Up(1), Concrete(1), Drywall(4), Electrical(3), Flooring(1), HVAC(2), Paint(1), Paving(2)...
  • Plans grouped by category: Architectural (3 plans), Civil (2 plans), Electrical (2 plans)
  • Each plan shows thumbnail + code (A2.01-1) + name (Building 1 Floor Plan)
  • Task count badge on each thumbnail (blue circle)
  • Top right: Filters, Version control toggle, Grid/List view toggle
  • + New plan button and + New folder button
  • MY TASKS (5) and WATCHED TASKS (2) quick filters in sidebar
📐
Plan Viewer — Full View with Tasks Panel
Fieldwire
  • Left toolbar: Fullscreen, Zoom+/-, Pin tool, Link, Draw, Stamp, Text, Pen, Record
  • Right panel: Tasks list related to this plan
  • Bottom bar: plan navigation arrows, plan name + edit, date/version dropdown
  • Multiple colored pins visible on plan (different colors = different assignees)
  • Green highlighted areas = annotated zones
  • Filter tasks button top right
🔍
Plan Viewer — Zoomed with Task Tooltip
Fieldwire
  • Hovering over a pin shows tooltip with task number and title
  • Pins show assignee initials with colored background
  • Text annotations directly on plan in orange/green
  • Smooth zoom — plan quality maintained at high zoom levels
  • Task tooltip: "#5 Plumbing for faucet does not align with sink"
  • THIS IS THE TARGET STATE for Kantier's PDF viewer
FW-03
Fieldwire — Tasks Board
Kanban-style task board with advanced filtering.
✅
Tasks Kanban Board — All Tasks
Fieldwire
  • Columns: Overdue (red), Priority 1, Priority 2, Priority 3, Completed, Verified
  • Each card shows: assignee avatar, task number, plan reference (@BSU|A2.01-1), title
  • Filter bar: Status, Category, Assignee, Creator, Plan, Tags, Locations, Time, Overdue, Show archived, Watching
  • Top actions: New task, Import tasks, Generate reports, Actions dropdown
  • View toggle top right: Board, Schedule, Map, Stats
  • Left sidebar shows categories with task counts — click to filter
  • "Due today" section separate in Overdue column
  • Kantier already has Priority 1/2/3 columns — needs Verified column + filters bar
Overdue
Past deadline, needs immediate attention
Priority 1
Most urgent active tasks
Priority 2
Important but not urgent
Priority 3
Low priority tasks
Completed
Done but not verified
Verified
Done and verified by supervisor
FW-04
Fieldwire — Task Detail Panel
The full task detail view — most complete reference for Kantier's task form.
📋
Task Detail — Full Panel with Attributes
Fieldwire
  • LEFT PANEL: Task title, Related Tasks (+New / +Existing), Checklist, Activity log
  • Activity log shows: who changed what and when (assignee, category, priority, photos, comments)
  • Photos attached directly in activity log with hashtags (#rework)
  • Message input at bottom for comments
  • RIGHT PANEL (Task Attributes): Status (Priority 1), Category (Plumbing), Assignee (Bob), Plan thumbnail + name, Location, Start date, End date, Manpower (24 Hours), Cost, Tags, Watchers
  • Navigation arrows to go to prev/next task without closing
  • CRITICAL: Kantier needs Start date, End date, Manpower, Cost, Tags, Watchers, Activity log fields
FW-05
Fieldwire — Files Module
Document management beyond plans.
📁
Files — Folder Structure
Fieldwire
  • Folder-based organization: #Sample Reports (3), Design Changes (1), RFIs (2), Specifications (1), Submittals (1)
  • Table columns: Type (icon), Name, Updated by, Last updated, Links
  • Actions: New file, New folder, Actions dropdown, Filter files
  • This is a separate module from Plans — for all non-plan documents
  • Kantier equivalent: Could be "Dokumentet" section — future module
PR-01
PlanRadar — Dashboard
PlanRadar's main dashboard with metric cards and project overview.
📊
Dashboard — Metric Cards + Project Overview
PlanRadar
  • 6 metric cards at top: Projects(1), Tickets created by me(15), Tickets assigned to me(0), Tickets as receiver(0), Tickets overdue(10), Tickets due soon(1)
  • Project card shows: name, code, start/end dates, ticket status breakdown (Open/In Progress/Resolved/Feedback/Closed/Rejected), total tickets count, overdue count, donut chart
  • "Generate project summary" link
  • Left sidebar: Dashboard, Tickets, Project reports, Schedule, SiteView, Documents, Approvals, Projects, Forms and Lists, User Management, Statistics, Templates
  • IMPORTANT: Kantier dashboard needs similar 6-card layout at minimum
PR-02
PlanRadar — Tickets List
PlanRadar calls tasks "Tickets" — full list view with filters.
🎫
Tickets — Filtered List View
PlanRadar
  • Status filter boxes at top: Open(7), In Progress(3), Resolved(2), Feedback(2), Closed(0), Rejected(1)
  • Table columns: ID, Numbering sequence, Title, Status (colored), Priority, Project, Layer, Created on, Updated
  • Timeline bar at right showing date distribution
  • Status colors: Open=orange, In Progress=blue, Resolved=green, Feedback=yellow, Rejected=red
  • Kantier equivalent: Detyrat list view — needs this table format as alternative to Kanban
PR-03
PlanRadar — Project Reports
Structured report generation with templates.
📄
Project Reports — Template System
PlanRadar
  • Empty state with onboarding tooltip: "With Project Reports, quickly collect project information into pre-defined templates"
  • Supports: checklists, inspections, site diaries, daily reports
  • All reports saved digitally for easy reference
  • "Create project report" button + template selector dropdown
  • Table columns: ID, Template, Status, Creator, Created on, Updated at
  • Kantier equivalent: Raportet — needs template system beyond auto-PDF generation

06
Task Fields — Kantier vs Fieldwire
Detailed field-by-field analysis of what Kantier's task form needs.
📝
Title
Task name/description
✓ Kantier has: titulli
🔴
Priority / Status
Priority 1/2/3 + Completed/Verified
~ Partial: has Priority 1/2/3 + Completed — needs Verified
🔧
Category
Plumbing, Electrical, Concrete, etc.
✓ Kantier has: kategoria
👤
Assignee
Who is responsible
✓ Kantier has: krijuar_nga (needs separate assignee field)
🗺️
Plan Link
Which plan + location (pin_x, pin_y)
✓ Kantier has: plan_id, pin_x, pin_y, pin_faqja
📸
Photos
Attached photos
✓ Kantier has: foto_urls
☑️
Checklist
Sub-items to complete
✓ Kantier has: checklist
💬
Comments
Discussion thread
✓ Kantier has: komentet
📅
Start Date
When work begins
✗ Missing — needs to add to detyrat table
📅
End Date / Deadline
When work must be done
✗ Missing — needs to add to detyrat table
👷
Manpower
Hours of labor required
✗ Missing — new field needed
💰
Cost
Cost estimate for this task
✗ Missing — new field needed
🏷️
Tags
Custom labels/hashtags
✗ Missing — new field needed
👁️
Watchers
People following this task
✗ Missing — new field needed
🔗
Related Tasks
Linked/dependent tasks
✗ Missing — needs relation table
📜
Activity Log
History of all changes
✗ Missing — needs audit log
